description_long: This handcart features a robust wooden construction with four large, round wheels attached to the sides, reinforced by visible metal bolts. The cart's body is composed of vertical and horizontal wooden slats, forming a deep, open receptacle ideal for carrying goods. Side rails run along the length of the cart, providing containment and structural support. At the front, a long, straight wooden handle extends outward, capped with a metal end for grip and durability. The wheels are designed to be sturdy and functional, with a wood grain texture and metal hubs. The overall appearance is rustic and utilitarian, suitable for transporting items in urban or park environments.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with four large wheels, side rails, and a long front handle, designed for carrying goods. The cart has a rustic, reinforced look with visible bolts and a deep open platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the cart, the depth of the load platform, and the parallel side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the four large wheels, the wooden slat construction, and the extended handle with a metal cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cart, the alignment of the side rails, and the handle extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wheels, slatted body, and handle from the other side.
